Document:
# Fugitive Hunters
Fugitive hunters are [color={role-type-free-agent-color}][bold]free agents[/bold][/color]. You are [bold]not[/bold] general station antagonists in this mode.
Your contract is specific: locate and capture fugitives. - Use your ship tracker pinpointer to navigate back to your insertion craft. - Use your bounty tracker pinpointer to locate fugitive targets. - Focus on fugitive captures, dead or alive.
## Conduct
- Do not treat unrelated crew as your objective. - Your job is bounty recovery, not broad station sabotage. - You may use force as needed against fugitives and resistance during capture attempts.
In short: you are contractors here for a job, not invaders here to destroy the station.
